cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where each ball ends up after all those swaps. There are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific color ball. The swaps happen in a sequence, so I need to track each swap step by step. First, let me list the initial assignments: - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: white - Eve: green Now, the swaps occur in the following order: 1. Dave and Eve swap balls. 2. Bob and Claire swap balls. 3. Claire and Alice swap balls. 4. Dave and Eve swap balls again. 5. Eve and Claire swap balls. I need to track each swap and update who has which ball accordingly. Maybe I can do this step by step, keeping track of each person's ball after each swap. Starting with the initial state: After the first swap (Dave and Eve): - Dave now has Eve's green ball. - Eve now has Dave's white ball. So now: - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: green - Eve: white Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. - Bob now has Claire's blue ball. - Claire now has Bob's brown ball. Now: - Alice: black - Bob: blue - Claire: brown - Dave: green - Eve: white Third swap: Claire and Alice swap. - Claire now has Alice's black ball. - Alice now has Claire's brown ball (which Claire had from the previous swap). Now: - Alice: brown - Bob: blue - Claire: black - Dave: green - Eve: white Fourth swap: Dave and Eve swap again. Remember, after the first swap, they had swapped once. Now swapping back? Wait, let's check what they have now before this swap: - Dave has green (from first swap) - Eve has white (from first swap) So swapping again would switch them back? Let's see: After fourth swap: - Dave gets Eve's white ball. - Eve gets Dave's green ball. So now: - Alice: brown - Bob: blue - Claire: black - Dave: white - Eve: green Wait, so this swap undoes the first one? Now Dave is back to white, and Eve back to green? Let me confirm: Yes, because first swap: Dave (white) and Eve (green) swap. Then fourth swap is the same pair swapping again, so they swap back to original? Or is there more swaps in between? No, between first and fourth swap, there were two more swaps (second and third). But the fourth swap is again between Dave and Eve. So regardless of what others did, Dave and
